sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62919" key="lh=myis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῆμψις</orth>, <sense id="n62919.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λῆψις</ref> </xr> (q.v.): <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λήμψομαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λήψομαι</ref></xr>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λαμβάνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
